overall.description: Third-person survival horror gameplay footage showing a character exploring a dark, foggy industrial storage yard at night using a flashlight. The character navigates through narrow corridors between corrugated metal buildings, past various debris and equipment, eventually reaching a boat on a trailer.

stacked blue plastic barrels and containers
scattered wooden pallets on the ground
metal wire cages stacked on top of each other
large items covered with green and brown tarps

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, dark industrial corridor between corrugated metal warehouse walls. The flashlight reveals storage racks, blue barrels, and tarp-covered equipment scattered along the dirt path.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial storage yard with vehicle parking

concrete wall with red graffiti and blood-like stains

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wider industrial yard where a white pickup truck is parked ahead. The character passes a concrete wall with graffiti and blood stains on the left, with chain link fencing visible on the right.

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a cluttered storage area with a yellow forklift and shipping containers. A corrugated metal workshop building becomes visible in the distance as the character navigates around the obstacles.

scene_state.functional_zone: boat storage and maintenance area near waterfront

white boat on a trailer or stands in the center of the yard

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a white boat on a trailer near the corrugated metal workshop, which now displays an American flag. Metal scaffolding and ladders surround the boat maintenance area as the character moves closer to inspect the vessel.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic industrial corridor that gradually opens into a cluttered outdoor storage yard. It begins by navigating a narrow dirt path between corrugated metal warehouse walls, where a flashlight illuminates blue barrels and tarp-covered equipment. As the space expands, the camera passes a graffiti-covered concrete wall stained with blood and a parked white pickup truck before moving deeper into the yard. The scene then shifts through a cluttered area filled with shipping containers and a yellow forklift, steering toward a distant corrugated metal workshop. Finally, the camera approaches a white boat on a trailer beneath an American flag, moving past metal scaffolding and ladders to inspect the vessel.
